code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api";const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL});export const getDashboardSummary=()=>apiClient.get("/dashboard/summary");export const getProducts=function(){let search=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";return apiClient.get("/products",{params:{search}});};export const addProduct=formData=>apiClient.post("/products",formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const updateProduct=(id,formData)=>apiClient.put(`/products/${id}`,formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const deleteProduct=id=>apiClient.delete(`/products/${id}`);export const createInvoice=payload=>apiClient.post("/invoices",payload);export const getInvoices=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/invoices",{params});};export const downloadInvoicePdf=id=>apiClient.get(`/invoices/${id}/pdf`,{responseType:"blob"});export const getReceipts=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/receipts",{params});};export const updateReceipt=(id,payload)=>apiClient.put(`/receipts/${id}`,payload);export const downloadReceiptPdf=id=>apiClient.get(`/receipts/${id}/pdf`,{responseType:"blob"});export const getDailyReport=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/reports/daily",{params});};export const getMonthlyReport=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/reports/monthly",{params});};export const getYearlyReport=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/reports/yearly",{params});};export const getTopProducts=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return apiClient.get("/reports/top-products",{params});};export default apiClient;
